title: Victoria (Gozo), Gozo District — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Victoria (Gozo), Gozo District: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Victoria (Gozo) is a city in Gozo District with a population of 7,000. The charming capital of Gozo island, a peaceful hilltop town with a medieval citadel, Baroque cathedral, and a relaxed Mediterranean island atmosphere.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
